rules.description: These commands must be run before any pull request is created or updated to ensure compliance with the Azure Verified Modules standards and prevent CI
rules.condition: custom instructions for github copilot agents

rules.description: > Note: The following links always point to the latest version of the CSV files on the main branch. As intended, this means the files may change over
Always pin module and provider versions
Follow AzureRM provider requirements and constraints
Always run `terraform fmt` after making changes
Always run `terraform validate` after making changes
1. Always check for existing modules before creating new resources
1. Version Conflicts: Always check compatibility between module and provider versions

directives.description: Azure Verified Modules (AVM) are pre-built, tested, and validated Terraform and Bicep modules that follow Azure best practices. Use these modules to c
Filter by "Partner" tag to find official AVM modules
Example: Search "avm storage account" → filter by Partner
1. Copy the example code from the module documentation
1. Copy the Provision Instructions from module documentation
